title: THORChain's Ice Age
relevance_summary: Leveraged lending protocol with significant liabilities leading to a death spiral

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints Rune to cover borrowed assets during market downturns
prevention.trigger: Borrow -> Mint Rune to cover obligations

red_flags: Large borrow amounts at low prices
Significant minting of Rune to cover obligations
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints Rune to cover borrowed assets during market downturns
summary: THORChain's THORFi lending protocol faced a death spiral due to significant liabilities and market downturns, leading to the minting of Rune to cover borrowed assets. A guard could have prevented this by blocking such transactions during market downturns.
